entry.title: New: CC 24-26 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
HOUSING AND LAND USE COMMITTEE CHAIR, transmitting an amendment to Resolution 24-115, entitled "AUTHORIZING AN AMENDMENT TO RESOLUTION 24-46, FD1 TO ADD LOTS TO THE GRANT OF LEASE OF COUNTY REAL PROPERTY TO COUNCIL FOR NATIVE HAWAIIAN ADVANCEMENT".

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
